title: Madware
content:
{{Top|leg}}
'''Madware''' was the name of a [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Confederacy of Independent Systems]] [[Computer/Legends|computer]] program intended for use in the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]]. Separatist terrorist agents would plant the program into [[Droid/Legends|droids]] on [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] [[Planet/Legends|worlds]]. Once inserted, the ''madware'' would override the standard programming and cause the droids to commit [[Death/Legends|deadly]] and destructive actions. Worlds that supported the Republic would find massive quantities of droids turning against them, causing wide-scale damage to property as well as numerous deaths.

==Appearances==
*''[[Yoda: Dark Rendezvous]]'' {{Ab|Yoda: Dark Rendezvous (unabridged audiobook)}}
